description: SURI.CZ is a Czech insurance comparison and brokerage service for vehicle, property, pet, life, travel, and accident insurance. Its public website focuses on consumer insurance quote flows and informational content.
summary: SURI.CZ exposes a known OAuth-protected MCP server at https://carb.suri.cz/api/mcp; no public HTTP, GraphQL, or CLI developer surfaces were found on suri.cz.
